compiled_state.title: Replace Step 3 Directives in SKILL.md with 3-gate framework
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Summary
Replace the "Stability" directive and implicit atomicity rules in implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 3 Directives with the 3-gate task granularity framework. Gate 1: must produce testable behavior (grepping for code existence is not valid). Gate 2: must leave codebase green with no regression. Gate 3: must not be possible to split the task into smaller tasks that each independently meet gates 1 and 2. Update the Common Mistakes table to reference the 3-gate framework.

## TDD Exemption
Static assets only (criterion 3 — Markdown documentation, no executable conditional logic). Note: no eval scenario currently covers 3-gate atomicity regression — create follow-up ticket if eval gap confirmed.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Gate 1 present (testable behavior)
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 1.*testable behavior\|must produce testable behavior' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate 2 present (codebase green)
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 2.*codebase.*green\|leave.*codebase.*green' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate 3 present (cannot split further)
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 3.*split\|not.*possible.*split.*further' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate 1 anti-pattern documented
  Verify: grep -q 'grep.*existence.*not.*valid\|grepping.*not.*valid' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Old Stability directive label removed
  Verify: ! grep -q '^\* \*\*Stability:\*\*' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Common Mistakes table references 3-gate framework
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 3\|3-gate\|cannot.*split.*further' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Eval gap check
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml && grep -q 'atomicity\|granularity\|3-gate' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml || echo "EVAL_GAP: no atomicity eval scenario — create follow-up ticket"
